result.short_description: Disk space critical on prod-db-01 — filesystem at 95%
result.description: Automated monitoring detected that the root filesystem on prod-db-01 has reached 95% capacity. Database write operations may start failing if disk usage reaches 100%. Immediate investigation and remediation required.

result.short_description: nginx not responding on prod-web-01 — health check failing
result.description: Load balancer health checks for prod-web-01 have been failing for the past 8 minutes. nginx process may have crashed or become unresponsive. Users are experiencing 502 errors on the main application.

result.short_description: Sustained high CPU on prod-api-01 — above 95% for 15 min
result.description: prod-api-01 has been reporting CPU utilisation above 95% for over 15 minutes. API response times have degraded from an average of 120ms to over 4 seconds. Root cause unknown — possible runaway process or traffic spike.

result.short_description: Nightly backup job failed on prod-db-01
result.description: The scheduled nightly backup job (backup-daily.sh) on prod-db-01 exited with a non-zero return code at 02:30 UTC. Last successful backup was 48 hours ago. Backup logs may contain details on the failure mode.

result.short_description: Application error rate spiking on prod-api-01 — 40x above baseline
result.description: Application log monitoring detected a spike in ERROR-level log entries on prod-api-01. Error rate is currently 40 times higher than the 7-day baseline. Errors appear to be related to downstream database connectivity. Correlation with INC0001042 (disk space) likely.
